charges: Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson and Ron Goldman
notes: Dubbed the trial of the century. Jury deliberated only 4 hours before acquitting. The case exposed racial divisions and police misconduct in the LAPD. Simpson was later imprisoned for armed robbery in Nevada.

charges: First-degree murder of daughter Caylee Anthony
verdict: Not guilty of murder - guilty of lying to police
notes: 2-year-old Caylee's body found in woods. Casey had partied for 31 days without reporting her missing. Acquittal shocked the nation. Anthony fled to Florida after release.
The shooting of 17-year-old Trayvon Martin sparked nationwide protests. Zimmerman claimed self-defense under Stand Your Ground. The verdict galvanized the Black Lives Matter movement.

charges: Murder of their parents Jose and Kitty Menendez
notes: Brothers shot their parents claiming decades of abuse. First trial ended in hung jury. Second trial banned abuse evidence. Case re-examined in 2024 with potential resentencing.
American student Knox was convicted then acquitted then re-convicted and finally acquitted by Italy's highest court after 8 years. The case raised questions about Italian forensic standards.
Music producer Spector shot actress Clarkson in his mansion. He claimed it was an accidental suicide. First trial deadlocked. Convicted in retrial. Died in prison 2021.

charges: Murder of pregnant wife Laci Peterson
notes: Peterson was convicted of killing his pregnant wife and dumping her body in the San Francisco Bay. The case was followed obsessively by media. Sentence commuted to life in 2021.
Jackson was accused of molesting a 13-year-old cancer patient. The 4-month trial was a media circus. Acquitted on all 14 counts. Allegations re-emerged after his death.

charges: Murder of wife Bonnie Lee Bakley
notes: Former Baretta actor was accused of shooting his wife outside a restaurant. His bodyguard refused to be a fall guy. Acquitted criminally but found liable in civil trial.

charges: Murder of husband Saturday Night Live comedian Phil Hartman
notes: Brynn Hartman shot Phil Hartman then killed herself hours later. The case highlighted substance abuse and domestic violence. Their two children were adopted by Phil's brother.
